name: Berbere (Ethiopian Hot Pepper Seasoning)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the whole spices (ground ginger, cardamom, coriander, fenugreek, nutmeg, cloves, and allspice) in a heavy saucepan over low heat for 4 to 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
2. Add salt, cayenne pepper, paprika, and fresh ground black pepper. Continue toasting and stirring for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and let cool completely before storing in a tightly covered glass jar. This seasoning will keep in the refrigerator for up to 5 or 6 months.
